title: tephrosia multifolia
intro: Tephrosia multifolia, also known as the many-leaved snakevine, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa, characterized by its twining stems and compound leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia multifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various ailments such as rheumatism and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a tea substitute.
